Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ruby]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow chooses the name Ruby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Ruby is a character who can take turns being the Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Ruby is Yerin's Blood Shadow and has developed a copy of Yerin's Steelborn Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Ruby was tossed aside by Crusher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Ruby is a Soul that has developed its own mind by copying Yerin's thoughts and feelings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Ruby is a Blood Shadow that looks like Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Ruby sticks to Lindon's side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Ruby used the Moonlight Bridge to run off.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Ruby uses her Goldsigns to shred blankets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Ruby was at Lindon's bedside when he woke up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Ruby is a person Mercy feels pity for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Ruby is an Overlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Ruby uses a black blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Ruby used the Moonlight Bridge to reappear above Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Ruby recovered during the battle and prepared a technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Ruby uses the Endless Sword technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Ruby carries the Heart’s Gem from the Blood Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Ruby cycles a blood aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Ruby has red hair and eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Ruby is willing to combine with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Dross had heard reports of Yerin becoming a half-Herald and wondered if she was Yerin or Ruby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Ruby is a character who was once running up to Lindon.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Ruby has blood madra.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Ruby is a blood spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Ruby is mentioned as being happy with Yerin's situation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Ruby is a spirit with a high level of existence.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin has merged with Ruby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Ruby was created through a specific process.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Ruby is associated with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Ruby is the name of the Blood Shadow that Yerin's relationship will become.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Ruby was hurt by Yerin's Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin has been using Ruby’s madra in her techniques.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Ruby is the evolved form of Yerin's Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin resembles Ruby when she pouts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Ruby is mentioned in relation to Yerin achieving a Herald state.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Ruby is a person Orthos has dealt with previously.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
